nasb.text: He fashioned the two pillars of bronze; eighteen cubits was the height of one pillar, and a line of twelve cubits measured the circumference of both.

esv.text: He cast two pillars of bronze. Eighteen cubits was the height of one pillar, and a line of twelve cubits measured its circumference. It was hollow, and its thickness was four fingers. The second pillar was the same.

cnv.text: 他鑄造了兩根銅柱，每根高八公尺，圓周五公尺三公寸。

ccb.text: 他铸造了两根铜柱，每根高八米，周长五点四米，
